div.style: height: 200px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%;

div.p: No departments available for this college

input.style: min-width: 160px; outline: none; box-shadow: none; background: transparent; padding: 4px 0;
input.placeholder: Search by Faculty, Department, Academic Degree, Specialization

button.class: btn btn-link position-absolute top-50 end-0 translate-middle-y me-2 text-decoration-none text-muted d-none

div.class: list-group position-absolute w-100 mt-2 shadow-sm d-none

div.div: No faculty members found for the selected filter.

div.style: width: 120px; height: 120px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

t.t-value: ('/report/pdf/ust_resume_management.ust_resume_report_en/' + str(resume_id_en) if resume_type == 'both' and resume_id_en else '/report/pdf/ust_resume_management.ust_resume_report_en/' + str(resume_id) if resume_type == 'en' else '/report/pdf/ust_resume_management.ust_resume_report/' + str(resume_id))

div.p: No faculty members available for this college

div.style: height: 200px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

p.t-esc: (course.description[:100] + '...') if course.description and len(course.description) > 100 else (course.description or '')

div.p: No courses available for this department

t.t-value: sem_key == first_semester_key if first_semester_key else False
sem_key == first_semester_key if first_semester_key else False

div.t-attf-class: tab-pane fade #{'show active' if is_first else ''}

tr.td: No courses available for this semester
